title: Plan 2c тАФ spectator mode, slow-mo vignette, Web Audio SFX
description:
## Summary

- **Spectator mode**: late-joiners who arrive during a match receive a `spectator:join` message, get a full-snapshot emit, and land on `SpectatorScene` (player picker, read-only HUD, slow-mo overlay)
- **Slow-mo vignette**: `match:event { e: 'slow-mo' }` triggers a CSS radial-gradient overlay + `backdropFilter: saturate(0.3)` + Pixi ticker speed drop to 0.2├Ч in both MatchScene and SpectatorScene
- **Web Audio SFX** (`sfx.ts`): zero-asset, lazy `AudioContext`; six synthesised sounds (shot├Ч3 weapons, melee thud, death sawtooth, zone two-tone pulse, slow-mo noise sweep, victory C-E-G arpeggio); mute toggle persisted to `localStorage`; mute button in Hud top-right corner

## Server changes

- `arena-server/src/proto/messages.ts` тАФ added `spectator:join` to `ClientMsg` union + `CLIENT_TYPES`
- `arena-server/src/game/tick.ts` тАФ added `getState(): MatchState` public accessor
- `arena-server/src/lobby/registry.ts` тАФ added `spectators?: Set<string>` to `Lobby`
- `arena-server/src/ws/handlers.ts` тАФ `lobby:join` now short-circuits to spectator path for in-match/slow-mo phases; new `spectator:join` case emits full-snapshot

## Client changes

- `website/src/components/arena/game/sfx.ts` тАФ new Web Audio synthesis module
- `website/src/components/arena/game/Renderer.ts` тАФ `setFollowTarget()` + `setTickerSpeed()`
- `website/src/components/arena/scenes/SpectatorScene.tsx` тАФ new scene
- `website/src/components/arena/scenes/MatchScene.tsx` тАФ slow-mo overlay + SFX hooks
- `website/src/components/arena/scenes/ResultsScene.tsx` тАФ `playVictory()` on mount
- `website/src/components/arena/hud/Hud.tsx` тАФ mute button + new props `isMuted`/`onMuteToggle`
- `website/src/components/arena/ArenaIsland.tsx` тАФ spectator routing + `playSlowMo()` on `lobby:state`

## Test Plan

- [x] `arena-server`: all 49 Vitest tests pass (`npx vitest run`)
- [x] `website`: `npx tsc --noEmit` тАФ 0 new errors (pre-existing errors in mentolder.ts/coaching tests unrelated)
- [x] FA-40 spectator join smoke test added + test-inventory regenerated
- [ ] Manual: open two browser tabs to the same lobby code mid-match, verify the late-joiner lands on SpectatorScene with player picker
- [ ] Manual: verify mute button persists state across page reload
- [ ] Manual: verify slow-mo vignette fades in on match-end trigger

ЁЯдЦ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
